summary.note: Competition list slice implements all non-blocked requirements from COMPETITION_LIST_PAGE_SPEC.zh-CN.md. Static governance, typecheck, production build, dependency audits, and narrow real-browser validation all pass. URL owns applied filters and page; retained refresh preserves old results; responsive desktop table and narrow semantic list render real API data. Contract-blocked capabilities (date range, registration, private events, live boards) remain excluded. COR closure remains owned by Direction 4.

CURRENT_IMPLEMENTED: URL-owned search, status, type, date and page state
Canonical query normalization and invalid-value correction notice
Explicit submit via Enter or 查询 button; no input debounce
Pagination preserves filters and writes page to URL
Desktop table and narrow semantic list
Result meta with total and page info
Initial loading, empty, complete failure and partial failure (retained refresh) states
Filter Sheet for tablet/narrow with apply/cancel
Stable pagination slot even with one or zero pages
CONTRACT_BLOCKED: Per-game content or live board data
OPEN_OWNER_DECISION: OD-08 only constrains future anonymous live multi-board scope
PROHIBITED: Per-game live/replay entry from the list
Raw response or internal code display

COR-010.title: Query → repository → Axios 取消链路
changes: useQuery queryFn passes signal to tournamentRepository.list.
fetchCompetitionList forwards signal to requestJson/Axios.
placeholderData: keepPreviousData keeps old results while new query fetches; cancellation does not show as error.
validation: Browser: navigating between filter pages does not produce error flashes.
Network inspection: AbortSignal attached to GetActList requests.

COR-012.title: 共享 Token 整理与原始视觉值归一
changes: Replaced fixed table min-width and raw filter grid constants with flex-based, token-driven layout.
All spacing, colors, borders, radii, typography and control heights use src/styles/tokens.css.
validation: pnpm run check:raw-visual-values PASS
pnpm run lint:style PASS

COR-013.title: 无障碍与键盘基础
changes: ProductRouteShell focuses h1 on route entry.
Result heading is focusable and receives focus after apply/page-change.
Filter Sheet uses ProductDrawer trap-focus and auto-focus.
Desktop table rows do not add extra tab stops; only 查看详情 links are focusable.
validation: Browser: Tab order reaches skip link, search, status/type/date fields, query, reset, result links, pagination.
Browser: filter Sheet opens with focus inside and closes via Escape/cancel.

COR-015.title: RouteShell 滚动所有权
changes: CompetitionListView wraps content in a bounded flex column with result-region as the sole overflow:auto scroll owner.
Header, filter, summary and pagination regions are fixed/flex tracks.
Long lists and 200% zoom remain reachable inside result-region; body does not scroll.
validation: Browser: document.body.scrollHeight === document.body.clientHeight at 1280x720 and 375x667.
Browser: result-region scrolls with PageDown/End.

COR-021.title: 产品术语清理
changes: Removed '生产赛事列表' subtitle; replaced with '查找公开赛事并查看组别、轮次和对阵。'.
All user-facing copy uses '赛事', '赛事列表', '查看详情', '查询', '清除筛选', '暂无赛事', '正在加载赛事列表'.
validation: pnpm run check:user-visible-copy PASS
Browser: no actflag/endpoint/internal hash terms visible.

COR-022.title: URL 成为筛选/分页 owner
changes: Applied filters, date and page are derived from route.query.
applyFilters and updatePage push normalized query with router.push.
Back/forward restores form draft and query key.
Invalid query values are corrected via router.replace and a transient warning banner.
validation: Browser: deep link /competitions?type=1&status=&date=2026-07 renders matching results.
Browser: page=2 deep link renders second page meta.
Browser: invalid status=99&page=abc&date=2026-13 is corrected to status=21&date=2026-07 with a warning banner.
Browser: browser back restores previous query and results.

COR-027.title: Naive UI 项目适配层复用
changes: Competition list uses existing project adapters for all shared controls.
No direct Naive UI palette overrides in page scoped styles.
validation: pnpm run check:architecture-boundaries PASS
Browser: controls render consistently with login/settings surfaces.

COR-028.title: 真实浏览器验收跨阶段门
changes: Performed route-specific narrow browser validation on /pgnViewer/competitions with multiple query states and viewports.
validation: Non-empty DOM for default, filtered and paginated states.
No Vite error overlay.
No breaking console errors.
Keyboard Tab reaches all interactive regions; filter Sheet traps focus.
Real state changes: filter apply, page change, invalid query correction, narrow sheet open/close.

checks.defaultState: Route header, page title, filters, result meta and pagination render; initial query canonicalizes to status=21&date=YYYY-MM.
checks.filteredResults: Deep link with type=1&status=&date=2026-07 shows '共 5 项' and desktop table or narrow list with 查看详情 links.
checks.pagination: Deep link page=2 shows '第 2 / 1120 页' and 22,382 total.
checks.invalidQueryCorrection: Invalid status/page/date are replaced with canonical defaults and a warning banner is shown.
checks.backForward: Browser back restores previous query URL and result state.
checks.filterSheet: Narrow viewport shows 筛选 button; opening Sheet displays filter fields and closes via cancel/Escape.
checks.scrollOwnership: document.body.scrollHeight equals clientHeight; result-region owns overflow.
checks.focus: Route h1 focused on entry; result heading focused after page/filter change.

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)

risksAndNextSteps: The live API returns actflag values outside the design-approved status options (20/21/22); the UI keeps the approved options and status='' (全部) returns all lifecycle states.
Some CompetitionListItem DTO fields (poster, sponsorLogo) can be null; mapper schema was relaxed to accept nullable strings.
Retained refresh (placeholderData) keeps old results during fetches; partial-failure banner shown when a refresh fails while old data exists.
